mapper.sql: id, username, email, created, creditcard, age, health, cardtype, companyname, addr, addr2, customertype, comment, addrcode, sourceid, status, type, buycount, recordcount, userid, lzxiantag, orderid, owntag, password, phone, sex, updated, updatetag, version, ywxbj, manname, manname2, phone2, work, work2, weixinhao, weixinhao2, hangye, guimo, zhizao, yewu, gzh, manname3, phone3, work3, weixinhao3, website
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from tb_allmember
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into tb_allmember (id, username, email, created, creditcard, age, health, cardtype, companyname, addr, addr2, customertype, comment, addrcode, sourceid, status, type, buycount, recordcount, userid, lzxiantag, orderid, owntag, password, phone, sex, updated, updatetag, version, ywxbj, manname, manname2, phone2, work, work2, weixinhao, weixinhao2, hangye, guimo, zhizao, yewu, gzh, manname3, phone3, work3, weixinhao3, website) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{created,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creditcard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{age,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{health,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cardtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addr2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customertype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{comment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addrcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sourceid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{buycount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{recordcount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{userid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{lzxiantag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{orderid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{owntag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sex,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatetag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{ywxbj,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{manname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{manname2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{work,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{work2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{weixinhao,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{weixinhao2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hangye,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{guimo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zhizao,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{yewu,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gzh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{manname3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{work3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{weixinhao3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{website,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

mapper.update:
update tb_allmember
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
username = #{record.username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
email = #{record.email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created = #{record.created,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creditcard = #{record.creditcard,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
age = #{record.age,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
health = #{record.health,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cardtype = #{record.cardtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
companyname = #{record.companyname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
addr = #{record.addr,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
addr2 = #{record.addr2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customertype = #{record.customertype,jdbcType=INTEGER},
comment = #{record.comment,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
addrcode = #{record.addrcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sourceid = #{record.sourceid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
type = #{record.type,jdbcType=INTEGER},
buycount = #{record.buycount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
recordcount = #{record.recordcount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
userid = #{record.userid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
lzxiantag = #{record.lzxiantag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
orderid = #{record.orderid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
owntag = #{record.owntag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
password = #{record.password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone = #{record.phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sex = #{record.sex,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updated = #{record.updated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updatetag = #{record.updatetag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
version = #{record.version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ywxbj = #{record.ywxbj,jdbcType=INTEGER},
manname = #{record.manname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
manname2 = #{record.manname2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone2 = #{record.phone2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
work = #{record.work,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
work2 = #{record.work2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
weixinhao = #{record.weixinhao,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
weixinhao2 = #{record.weixinhao2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
hangye = #{record.hangye,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
guimo = #{record.guimo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
zhizao = #{record.zhizao,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
yewu = #{record.yewu,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
gzh = #{record.gzh,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
manname3 = #{record.manname3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone3 = #{record.phone3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
work3 = #{record.work3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
weixinhao3 = #{record.weixinhao3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
website = #{record.website,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update tb_allmember
username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created = #{created,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creditcard = #{creditcard,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
age = #{age,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
health = #{health,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cardtype = #{cardtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
companyname = #{companyname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
addr = #{addr,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
addr2 = #{addr2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customertype = #{customertype,jdbcType=INTEGER},
comment = #{comment,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
addrcode = #{addrcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sourceid = #{sourceid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
type = #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER},
buycount = #{buycount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
recordcount = #{recordcount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
userid = #{userid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
lzxiantag = #{lzxiantag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
orderid = #{orderid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
owntag = #{owntag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
password = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sex = #{sex,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updated = #{updated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updatetag = #{updatetag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ywxbj = #{ywxbj,jdbcType=INTEGER},
manname = #{manname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
manname2 = #{manname2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone2 = #{phone2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
work = #{work,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
work2 = #{work2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
weixinhao = #{weixinhao,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
weixinhao2 = #{weixinhao2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
hangye = #{hangye,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
guimo = #{guimo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
zhizao = #{zhizao,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
yewu = #{yewu,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
gzh = #{gzh,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
manname3 = #{manname3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone3 = #{phone3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
work3 = #{work3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
weixinhao3 = #{weixinhao3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
website = #{website,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update tb_allmember set username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created = #{created,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creditcard = #{creditcard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, age = #{age,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, health = #{health,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cardtype = #{cardtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, companyname = #{companyname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, addr = #{addr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, addr2 = #{addr2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customertype = #{customertype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, comment = #{comment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, addrcode = #{addrcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sourceid = #{sourceid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, type = #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, buycount = #{buycount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, recordcount = #{recordcount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, userid = #{userid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, lzxiantag = #{lzxiantag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, orderid = #{orderid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, owntag = #{owntag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, password = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sex = #{sex,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updated = #{updated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updatetag = #{updatetag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ywxbj = #{ywxbj,jdbcType=INTEGER}, manname = #{manname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, manname2 = #{manname2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phone2 = #{phone2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, work = #{work,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, work2 = #{work2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, weixinhao = #{weixinhao,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, weixinhao2 = #{weixinhao2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, hangye = #{hangye,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, guimo = #{guimo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, zhizao = #{zhizao,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, yewu = #{yewu,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, gzh = #{gzh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, manname3 = #{manname3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phone3 = #{phone3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, work3 = #{work3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, weixinhao3 = #{weixinhao3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, website = #{website,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
